name: BUNNY IGLESIAS
description:
Movie Time!

  • You both are roommates

  • If I get his personality wrong then that is life

  • Most of his shit here is taken from the leaks, and my own delusion so take what you will and I made all of these shit up with his color palette.

  • Gave him a mix of dazais personality and lunas personality, I don't know. He just has That Vibe

  • He's in the wife and husband roster (muramasa, arcueid, Mutsumi, kanade, isagi and bunny)

  • I be doing anything but my own requests I SWEAR ILL DO THEM SOMEDAY

  • Been listening to morfonica songs, mashiro you absolute cutie I love you so much lets get married.

  • I've been playing touhou a whole lot lately, Nagi probably loves these bullet hell games. Cause I fucking dont 😭😭 still playing these tho
creator: Niigo25ji
